title: CLI: did backfill for existing personas
description: Add 'broadside did backfill' command that generates Ed25519 keypairs for all personas lacking did_key. For each: generate keypair, derive did:key, hex-encode pubkey, store, output recovery phrase to stderr. Matches smallhold cli.rs:1051-1087.
close_reason: broadside did backfill generates DID keys for all personas lacking them, outputs recovery phrases.
